leadText: Three Isle Path (Japanese: ３のしま よこあな Island 3 Tunnel) is a small underground passage located in the Sevii Islands archipelago. Initially a cave famous as a source of gold, this location is gradually expanded into a tunnel over the course of Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen. Once completed, the tunnel leads to an isolated patch of grass where wild Dunsparce can be caught. The cave itself houses no wild Pokémon.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The man mining for gold inside Three Isle Path talks about wanting to buy a house from Kanto , heavily suggesting that he is the same man who can be found living at Route 2 in Generation II and Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver , also giving the player a Nugget when first met. This is also supported by their identical dialogue after giving the player a Nugget. The same man also appears in the Malie City Ferry Terminal in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon , once again handing the player a Nugget, as well as mentioning how he used to dig up a lot of them on the Sevii Islands.
